projectDescription: A professional penetration testing and cybersecurity consultancy platform that offers security assessment services, a client portal for tracking projects and accessing reports, and a secure contact system for requesting engagements.
keyFeatures: Six comprehensive penetration testing service types (Web App, API, Mobile, Network, Cloud, Red Team)
Structured six-phase testing methodology aligned with OWASP, NIST, and PTES standards
Secure client portal for tracking active projects and accessing delivered reports
Detailed vulnerability reports with CVSS scores and remediation guidance
Anonymized case studies demonstrating real-world security outcomes
Secure assessment request form with owner notification system
Report access logging and expiry controls for compliance and auditability
Mobile-first responsive design with accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA)
publicApiSurface: blog.getBySlug — Get specific blog post by slug
caseStudies.getBySlug — Get specific case study by slug
contact.submit — Submit a security assessment request
clientPortal.projects — Get all projects for authenticated client
clientPortal.projectReports — Get delivered reports for a project
clientPortal.reportAccessHistory — Get report access audit log
clientPortal.searchReports — Search reports across all projects
